config_metadata.experimentName: Blending simulation and abstraction for physical reasoning (Exp 1)
config_metadata.description: Participants watch short 2D physics videos and judge whether a falling ball will eventually reach a rectangular goal after disappearing behind slides. The experiment includes six practice clips followed by 48 main Yes/No judgments.
